operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_message_sequences (user_id, next_user_message_id) VALUES (:user_id, :next_user_message_id)

operation.name: SelectForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, next_user_message_id FROM user_message_sequences WHERE user_id = :user_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

operation.name: UpdateNext
operation.sql: UPDATE user_message_sequences SET next_user_message_id = :next_user_message_id WHERE user_id = :user_id
